attribute_label: Overtime, callback, holdover, or mandatory extra work

Management's reserved authority to direct staffing/operations; a counterweight clause present across groups.
Shift/assignment/specialty pay add-ons beyond base wage; a narrower, more occupation-specific channel.
Explicit statutory/civil-service framing of the bargaining relationship (e.g., Chapter 174, ORC 4117).
